debug_info.goal:
F : Type
inst✝¹ : Field F
inst✝ : DecidableEq F
⊢ ∀ (cl : Circuit F F) (cr : Circuit F (ℕ × F)) (G : List (Entry F (ℕ × F))),
    wf G cl cr → List.Forall (fun entry => entry.l = (Exp.c entry.r.2).eval) G → cl ≈ Clap.Dedup.dedup F inst✝ F cr

failed_attempts:
by
  intros cl cr G h_wf h_G
  suffices ∀ n set, (∀ e ∈ set, (to_var e).eval G = 0) → cl ≈ dedup_ cr n set by
    apply this; simp
  intro n set h_set
  induction h_wf generalizing n set <;> simp [dedup_]
  case nil => rfl
  case eq0 el er kl kr heq _ ih =>
    split
    next h_in =>
      have h_zero : el.eval G = 0 := by rw [heq]; apply h_set; assumption
      rw [Sim.eq0_true h_zero]
      apply ih; assumption
    next =>
      apply Sim.eq0 heq
      intro h_zero
      apply ih
      intro e h_e
      cases h_e
      · rw [←heq, h_zero]; rfl
      · apply h_set; assumption
  case lam => apply Sim.lam; intro; apply ih; assumption
  case share => apply Sim.share; intro; apply ih; assumption
  case is_zero => apply Sim.is_zero; intro; apply ih; assumption
